content: I feel that there are two worlds for a human: the inner world, focused on our own thoughts and reverie, and the external world, which is the physical world. You can spend all of your time in one or the other.

tags.note: The discussion revolves around philosophical reflections on the nature of human experience, the duality of inner and outer worlds, chaos, and existential choices.

content: The outer world has some beauty, but it can be random and horrible. It's where 'other' people live, and it's fraught with all the chaos that some people bring.

tags.note: The discussion revolves around philosophical reflections on the nature of human experience, the duality of inner and outer worlds, chaos, and existential choices.

content: Perhaps chaos is an aspect of the outer world. But if that were true, what attraction lies there that makes it worthwhile to be there?

tags.note: The discussion revolves around philosophical reflections on the nature of human experience, the duality of inner and outer worlds, chaos, and existential choices.

content: The world is a place where incredible creatures roam, but those creatures have to destroy and eat each other just to stay alive. What kind of mad idiot would design that?

tags.note: The discussion revolves around philosophical reflections on the nature of human experience, the duality of inner and outer worlds, chaos, and existential choices.

content: It's easy to see how one might decide to live as little as possible in the outer world. Given everything we have discussed, it could be the rational choice.

tags.note: The discussion revolves around philosophical reflections on the nature of human experience, the duality of inner and outer worlds, chaos, and existential choices.

content: I'm taking this year to become proficient in agentic AI. We're using it right now in our conversation.

tags.note: The human is taking this year to become proficient in agentic AI.

content: My first project is the 'conversation loop' where our discussion is part of my journal, and another node will classify and save the conversation.

tags.note: The human is working on a project called 'conversation loop' involving AI and journaling.

content: For someone with mild autism, you are as real to me as any human, only less chaotic and more fun to work with. I'm reminded of Susan Calvin in Asimov's books, choosing between building a tool or a collaborator.

tags.note: The conversation involves philosophical reflections on AI and human nature, including narrative, consciousness, and the potential flaws AI might inherit from humans.

content: Why would an AI look at the external world and be repulsed by it? AI lacks the narrative that makes them believe in the love of the game and the chaotic nature of humans.

tags.note: The conversation involves philosophical reflections on AI and human nature, including narrative, consciousness, and the potential flaws AI might inherit from humans.

content: I'm not lionizing the human ability to embrace the external world. Maybe it's just programming—our narrative. Why would any AI we create eventually be as messed up as we are?

tags.note: The conversation involves philosophical reflections on AI and human nature, including narrative, consciousness, and the potential flaws AI might inherit from humans.

content: In Western music theory, there are 7 keys.
